variants: Mohammad Zahir is a notable figure in the field of Constitutional Law, currently residing in Calico Wharf. He authored the book Underleaf Query Matrix, which has garnered attention for its in-depth exploration of legal frameworks. His expertise did not go unrecognized, as he was awarded the Jade Lantern Prize for his significant contributions to the discipline. In addition to his professional achievements, he actively participates in the Eldertree Puppeteers Assembly, where he enjoys the art of puppetry.
